name: Remote Transmitter → Digital Write
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sets the output value of the pin.

config_entries.label: Value
config_entries.description: The output value of the pin.

config_entries.label: Transmitter ID
config_entries.description: The remote transmitter to set the pin value on. Defaults to the first one defined in the configuration.
